description_long: This is a modern, boxy single-seat sofa with a robust black outer frame and light beige fabric cushions. The sofa features thick, straight armrests and a backrest that are all at the same height, creating a geometric, enclosed seating area. The seat, back, and side cushions are upholstered in a textured, woven fabric with a subtle grid pattern, providing a soft and inviting appearance. The legs are simple, straight, and positioned at the corners, elevating the sofa slightly off the ground. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor public spaces. The contrast between the dark frame and light cushions gives it a contemporary, stylish look.
description: A modern, boxy single-seat sofa with a black frame and light beige textured cushions, featuring straight armrests and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight black armrest and the textured beige cushion inside the frame.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid black back panel and the top edge of the beige back cushion.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the same straight armrest and visible cushion.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full seat, back, and side cushions, emphasizing the enclosed seating area and the geometric arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large seat cushion and one large back cushion, both loose and uniform in size, with two side cushions forming the armrests.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at seat height, fully padded and integrated into the frame, matching the backrest in height and style.
attribute_leg_design: Four straight, block-style legs positioned at the corners, likely made of wood or metal, with a simple, functional appearance and no decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with a single large cushion, matching the armrest height and providing full back support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured woven fabric with a subtle grid or check pattern in light beige, giving a soft, tactile appearance without decorative stitching.
